name: Boots of Quick Marching
description:
These brown leather shoes have surprisingly thick soles, as though a cobbler had recently repaired them. The tan laces always pull to exactly the right tautness for your feet and ankles to feel supported. You can perform the exploration mode activity for twice as many minutes as normal, equal to your Constitution modifier × 20 (minimum 20).

Activate—Big Step 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The soles on your boots grow even thicker for a moment, proving a bounce to your step. You Step twice.
